channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs.2.03 per Share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd has declared an interim dividend of Rs.2.03 per equity share for the Financial Year 2025-26. The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline. The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders to receive the dividend has been fixed as Friday, 20th March, 2026. The Board Meeting commenced at 11:30 a.m. and concluded at 12:10 p.m.

  • Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd declares an interim dividend of Rs.2.03 per equity share for FY 2025-26
  • The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline
  • The record date for dividend eligibility is fixed as 20th March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RETAGGIO] Urja Ships Pvt Ltd Acquires 16,00,000 Equity Shares of Retaggio Industries Ltd Through Conversion of Convertible Warrants
item.description:
Urja Ships Pvt Ltd, through its director Sandeep Kothari, has acquired 16,00,000 equity shares of Retaggio Industries Ltd. The acquisition was made on 5th March 2026, pursuant to the conversion of convertible warrants of face value Rs. 10/- each at a premium of Rs. 16/- per warrant. This acquisition increases Urja Ships Pvt Ltd's holding in Retaggio Industries Ltd to 14.42% from the previous 14.43%.

  • Urja Ships Pvt Ltd acquires 16,00,000 equity shares of Retaggio Industries Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made on 5th March 2026 through the conversion of convertible warrants.
  • This increases Urja Ships Pvt Ltd's holding in Retaggio Industries Ltd to 14.42%.
  • Retaggio Industries Ltd's equity share capital increases to 17,16,61,600 after the acquisition.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of Retaggio Industries Ltd increases to 34,67,61,600 after the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Retaggio Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KOTYARK] Kotyark Industries Ltd: Gaurang R Shah HUF Disposes of 2,00,000 Equity Shares via Open Market Transaction
item.description:
Kotyark Industries Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Gaurang R Shah HUF & Others regarding the disposal of 2,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs.10/- each through an open market transaction. The shares were disposed of by Gaurang R Shah HUF, with other persons acting in concert including Mr. Gaurang Rameshchandra Shah, Mrs. Bhaviniben Gaurang Shah, Mr. Brijkumar Gaurang Shah, Mr. Vandan Gaurang Shah, Ms. Hemaben Pratikbhai Bakshi, Ms. Ketkiben Ajaykumar Shah, Ms. Dipikaben Ashokkumar Shah, Mr. Depen Ashokkumar Shah, Ms. Rupalben Snehalkumar Patel, Ms. Zalak Jignesh Desai, M/s. Kotyark Agro Private Limited, M/s. Kotyark Bio Specialities Limited, M/s. Semani Industries Limited, M/s. Khadayata Industries Limited, M/s. Kotyark Proteins Private Limited, M/s. Asia Bio Fuels LLP, and M/s. Parth Renewable Energy LLP.

  • Gaurang R Shah HUF disposes of 2,00,000 Equity Shares of Kotyark Industries Ltd via open market transaction.
  • Other persons acting in concert with Gaurang R Shah HUF also part of the share disposal.
  • Disposal includes shares from various associated entities such as Kotyark Agro Private Limited, Kotyark Bio Specialities Limited, Semani Industries Limited, Khadayata Industries Limited, Kotyark Proteins Private Limited, Asia Bio Fuels LLP, and Parth Renewable Energy LLP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kotyark Industries Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [INERTIAST] Banganga Paper Industries Ltd: Ronak Jain & Others Acquire Shares Through Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ronak Jain & Others have acquired shares of Banganga Paper Industries Ltd (formerly known as Asgard Alcobev Limited) through an Off-market purchase in accordance with a Share Purchase Agreement. The total number of Equity Shares acquired by Ronak Jain, Mrs. Sarita Jain, Mrs. Priyanka Jain, M/s. K K Impex and Trading Private Limited, Mr. Karan Jain, Ms. Karishma Rohit Jain and Mrs. Radhika Karan Jain is 18,56,29,680 Equity Shares, which amounts to 59.59% of the total share capital of the company. This acquisition also includes 2,20,00,000 warrants.

  • Ronak Jain & Others acquire 59.59% shares of Banganga Paper Industries Ltd through Off-market purchase
  • The acquisition is in accordance with a Share Purchase Agreement dated 17.12.2025
  • The total number of Equity Shares acquired is 18,56,29,680
  • The acquisition also includes 2,20,00,000 warrants
  • Ronak Jain is the main Acquirer with a share of 37.82%

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INERTIA STEEL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INERTIAST] Ronak Jain & Others Acquire 27.28% Stake in Banganga Paper Industries Ltd Through Share Purchase Agreement
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ronak Jain and other acquirers have purchased 27.28% shares in Banganga Paper Industries Ltd, which is now known as Asgard Alcobev Limited, through a Share Purchase Agreement. The acquisition includes 8,50,00,000 shares carrying voting rights, and 2,20,00,000 warrants/convertible securities. This acquisition makes Ronak Jain and others significant shareholders in the company, which may lead to a change in the company's management and policies.

  • Ronak Jain and others have acquired 27.28% shares in Banganga Paper Industries Ltd through a Share Purchase Agreement.
  • The acquisition includes 8,50,00,000 shares carrying voting rights and 2,20,00,000 warrants/convertible securities.
  • This acquisition may lead to a change in the company's management and policies.
  • Banganga Paper Industries Ltd is now known as Asgard Alcobev Limited.
  • Ronak Jain and others may become the promoters of the company after the completion of the open offer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INERTIA STEEL LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Fined by BSE Limited for Non-Compliance with Listing Regulations
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. has been fined by BSE Limited due to non-compliance with Regulation 17(1), 17(2A), 18(1) and 19(1)/19(2) of the Listing Regulations for the quarter ended on 31st December, 2025. The company is a Central Public Sector Enterprise under the administrative control of the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas. The Board of Directors, in a meeting held on 16th March, 2026, took note of the fines and confirmed the contents of a representation made to the Stock Exchange. The company's composition of the Board of Directors is dependent on direction by the Administrative Ministry, which are factors beyond the control of the company.

  • Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd. fined by BSE Limited
  • Non-compliance with Regulation 17(1), 17(2A), 18(1) and 19(1)/19(2) of the Listing Regulations
  • Company is a Central Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
  • Board of Directors considered and took on record the fines
  • Company's Board composition dependent on Administrative Ministry direction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [SHANKARA] Ballygunge Family Trust Acquires Shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd
item.description:
The Ballygunge Family Trust has acquired 0.0824% of the total voting capital of Shankara Building Products Ltd through the open market. The total voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 2,42,49,326 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.

  • The Ballygunge Family Trust has acquired 20,000 shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd, amounting to 0.0824% of the total voting capital.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market.
  • The total voting capital of Shankara Building Products Ltd remains unchanged at 2,42,49,326 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each.
  • The acquisition was made on March 14, 2026.
  • The Ballygunge Family Trust now holds 6,58,915 shares of Shankara Building Products Ltd, including encumbered shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shankara Building Products Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs.2.03 per Share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd has declared an interim dividend of Rs.2.03 per equity share for the Financial Year 2025-26. The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline. The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders to receive the dividend has been fixed as Friday, 20th March, 2026. The Board Meeting commenced at 11:30 a.m. and concluded at 12:10 p.m.

  • Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd has declared an interim dividend of Rs.2.03 per equity share for the Financial Year 2025-26.
  • The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline.
  • The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders to receive the dividend has been fixed as Friday, 20th March, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [PNBGILTS] PNB Gilts Ltd Appoints Ms. Anju Mittal as Additional Director
item.description:
PNB Gilts Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India for the appointment of Ms. Anju Mittal as an Additional Director (Non-Executive & Non-Independent) of the company. The appointment is effective from 16.03.2026, following the allotment of DIN by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India on 05.12.2025. Ms. Mittal, General Manager of the Compliance Division at PNB, was approved by the Board of Directors on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

  • PNB Gilts Ltd has appointed Ms. Anju Mittal as an Additional Director.
  • The appointment is effective from 16.03.2026.
  • Ms. Mittal is the General Manager of the Compliance Division at PNB.
  • The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors and the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.
  • The Reserve Bank of India has conveyed its approval for the appointment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNB GILTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BLIL] Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd Declares Interim Dividend of Rs.2.03 per Share for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie Investments Ltd has declared an interim dividend of Rs.2.03 per equity share for the Financial Year 2025-26. The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline. The record date to determine the eligibility of shareholders to receive the dividend has been fixed as Friday, 20th March, 2026.

  • The dividend will be paid within the statutory timeline.
